title: Aspids Origins
description: Gives the player an origin that reflects the Aspids from Hollow Knight. Requires Pehkui and Origins.
body:
Gives the player an origin that reflects the Aspid Trio from Hollow Knight. Requires Pehkui and Origins. This mod was made using the Origins Creator, so feal free to upload it there to make any modifications. I do not own any of the tools used in its creation and do not wish to limit others' creativity.

If you are using fabric, use the fabric API. If you are using forge no need for an API, but use the forge port for origins and it's dependencies.

This mod was only tested on a client-sided world within the Fabric launcher. It should still work in Forge, though. Not all powers will be listed in the origins selector, so you’ll have to discover your strengths and weaknesses as you play. If you want to know exactly what your getting into, you can read the description of each powers bellow.

Common powers

These power are shared between all 3 variants. Which is most of them, since the upgrades are mostly simple number changes.

Positive

 - **GERONIMO! :** Due to being a Winged insect, you can survive any fall without a scratch. So don't be afraid to jump. The void can still kill you so don’t try it in the end. _(if your wings run out of juice, you will still take fall damage.)_ - **Hellborn :** You cleary are a spawn of satan, so of cours lava does noting to you. In fact, you can move very well in it. Thought you still have trouble manuvering in water. _(You start off only gaining a minor speed boost in lava, a fire damage immunity and moving slower in water. after your first upgrade, you gain the ability to swim and see clearly in lava.)_ - **Setae :** You have setaes on you arms and legs. Allowing you to climb up walls. But not everything.

Neutral

 - **WHY WONT YOU DIE :** You are a little shithead that for some reason can survive againts imposible odds, but don't try to go to close to them since your not very adept in close quarters combat. _(details for each varient is found it there individual section, the power simply has the same name and description for each of them)_ - **Temperature sensitive :** As an insect, you are extremly sensitive to temperature change in your environment. geting stronger when its hot, and weaker when its cold. - **High tolerance :** You are immune to some potion effect. _(wither, poison, dolphins grace, hero of the village and water breathing)_

Negative

 - **HATED :** Aparently, vilagers don't take to kindly to the act your people did to them in the past, they now refuse to trade with you and have even modifed the iron golem so they can eliminate members of your speicies on sight. _(dissable trading, iron golem will attack you and become very annoying to be around)_ - **Pridefull :** You can only wear armor that is enchanted due to your pride. - **Masked :** To keep your mind stable, you are constantly wearing a mask. Coincidentally, it keeps getting filled with water every time you go swimming or it rains. _(gain a stacking blindness, slowness and weakness effect when it rains or you are in water.)_
Aspid

Active

 - **Gliding :** Your tired wings, while no longer able to hold you up, cant still stop you form falling at MACH 5 into the ground. Just make sure you dont get to tired our gravity will remind you who is the boss. - **Infected Spit :** As an Aspid hunter, ou can spew out at high velocity a blob of highly corosive substance. Perfect for anoying others. - **Minor Dash :** Alows you to dash in the direction you are looking. Even while in the air or using an elytra!

Positive

 - **Ranged Specialist :** You deal 75% more damage with Projectile, with a very low chance to set the target on fire.

Neutral

 - **WHY WONT YOU DIE :** _( you take 40% more knockback, jump 50% higher, have 4 less hearts, count as an arthropod (meaning you take bonus damage from bain if arthropods), magma block are slippery, you are incapable of running while in rain, on frosted ice, ice, blue ice and packed ice. You move extremly slow on ice, packed ice, blue ice and frosted ice. You also are 50% smaller than a normal player.)_

Negative

 - **No Melee :** You deal 90% less melee damage with anyting but your hand since you only evolved them recently. But you seem very good at slaping people with fishes.
Primal Aspid
How to unlock from Aspid.

Unlock the We need to go deeper achivement or simply go to the nether.

How to unlock from Ancient Aspid.

Unlock the Ah shit, here we go again. achivement by drinking a bottle of honney.

Powers

Active

 - **Winged :** Now reinvigorated, your wings are able to carry your full weight. Making you able to hover at any height.Just make sure you dont get to tired and watch out for the landing. - **Infected Triple Spit :** As a Primal Aspid, you can spew out at high velocity multiple blob of highly corrosive substance. Perfect for annoying others. - **Dash :** Now reinvigorated, you can dash even further away in the direction you are looking. Even while in the air or using an elytra.

Positive

 - **Ranged Specialist :** You deal 125% more damage with Projectile, with a slightly higher chance to set the target on fire.

Neutral

 - **WHY WONT YOU DIE :** _( you take 40% more knockback, jump 50% higher, have 2 more hearts, count as an arthropod (meaning you take bonus damage from bain if arthropods), magma block are slippery, you are incapable of running while in rain, on frosted ice, ice, blue ice and packed ice. You move extremly slow on ice, packed ice, blue ice and frosted ice. You also are 25% smaller than a normal player.)_

Negative

 - **No Melee :** You deal 90% less melee damage with anyting but your hand since you only evolved them recently. But you seem very good at slaping people with fishes.
Ancient Aspid
How to unlock

Unlock the RETURN TO INSECTS! achivement by drinking dragons breath. (yes, the title is a reference to TheRusianBadger)

Powers - **Winged :** Now reinvigorated, your wings are able to carry your full weight. Making you able to hover at any height.Just make sure you dont get to tired and watch out for the landing. - **Spray and Pray :** Your sacks now gigantic, you no longer care about being careful and spew out a beam of acid at whatever you no longer wish to see. emptying your sacks completly in there face. - **Long Dash :** Now reinvigorated, you can dash even further away in the direction you are looking. Even while in the air or using an elytra. Sending you into the stratosphere!

Positive

 - **Ranged Specialist :** You deal 150% more damage with Projectile, with a high chance to set the target on fire.

Neutral

 - **WHY WONT YOU DIE :** _( you jump 50% higher, have 8 more hearts, count as an arthropod (meaning you take bonus damage from bain if arthropods), magma block are slippery, you are incapable of running while in rain, on frosted ice, ice, blue ice and packed ice. You move extremly slow on ice, packed ice, blue ice and frosted ice. You also are 25% biger than a normal player.)_

Negative

 - **Less Melee :** You deal 50% less melee damage with anyting but your hand since you only evolved them recently. But you seem very good at slaping people with fishes.

Good luck and have fun!
